problem id: e4ea8dbc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00011000 -> 00000001
  11000000 -> 00001100
  10110111 -> 11101011
  00000001 -> 00100000
  10111111 -> 11101011
  11010000 -> 00001101
  10010000 -> 00001001
  10101101 -> 10101010

query: 10011110
predicted answer: 11001001
